case_title: SELLICK, BRENNT L. VS WILLIAMS, THELMA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENNT L.
